subject: A tall, slender Eldrazi creature standing upright amid rivers of molten lava — elongated insectoid torso with splayed limbs and a featureless smooth head, surrounded by fire and glowing heat
description: A mid-shot of a tall, thin Eldrazi creature standing in a volcanic environment. Its body is deep purple-black with dark teal accents along the limbs, which are long and branch-like, splaying outward from its torso. The head is elongated, smooth, and featureless in the Eldrazi register — no recognizable face. Surrounding it are vivid rivers and splashes of molten lava in bright orange and red. Rocky formations of dark stone frame the background. The creature's posture is upright and open-limbed, arms extended. The lava environment gives the composition intense warm light from below, contrasting with the creature's cool dark palette.
foreground: Splashing molten lava, dark stone surface, Eldrazi creature's lower limbs
background: Rocky volcanic cave walls, additional lava flows, dark sky
